notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the ghostscript SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 2 CVEs: CVE-2024-46951, CVE-2024-46953.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: ghostscript security update for CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8
